rules.name: EMEA_Enterprise_UK_and_other_40K_Charlotte_Plastow
rules.label: EMEA Enterprise UK and other/40K/Charlotte Plastow

rules.name: Resellers_30K_Yoav_Litoff
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10) AND 11 AND 12
rules.label: Resellers/30K/Yoav Litoff

Flow.description: If you work with this flow please make sure that id Greg Farrell and Kelvin Seah are the same in Prod, because it's a new user and they have different IDs in Prod/Full/Partial. In Metadata 'Request - Auto-Creation' Doc - https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tuFjhzlnOqvM8yetbNua5qmri7a32F30XmeYUdSa_g0/edit#gid=0
Flow.label: Request - Auto-Create and assignment SE Request

recordCreates.name: SE_EMEA_Enterprise_UK_and_other_40K
recordCreates.label: SE - EMEA Enterprise UK and other/40K

recordLookups.name: Get_EMEA_Enterprise_UK_and_other_40K
